enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a technical snag he hit while working on a Google Earth project mapping defunct ski resorts — a file-linking issue in Adobe software that cost him about 90 minutes and a fruitless tech support call. He plans to continue the project and aims to finish by the upcoming Friday or weekend.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Unhelpful — the support rep spent an hour without solving anything, and Kyle figured out the real cause himself
Finds it genuinely interesting; surprised by how many there are
